title: Does the Indian Ocean rescue an El Nino monsoon?

rows.label: with a positive Indian Ocean Dipole
with a neutral or negative dipole

metadata.note: El Nino monsoons that coincided with a positive Indian Ocean Dipole averaged near-normal rainfall; those without averaged a clear deficit. The dipole softens the blow on average - but 1972 was a severe drought despite a positive dipole, so it is a tilt, not a shield.
